Wrapped result

A result using Google's known redirect wrapper.

Wrapped result

The same destination through the alternate wrapper parameter.

Foreign wrapper-shaped result

A foreign site whose path resembles a Google wrapper.

Malformed Google wrapper

Should be discarded.

Missing Google wrapper target

Should be discarded.

Non-HTTP Google wrapper

Should be discarded.
